title: tagetes riojana
intro: Tagetes riojana, also known as Riojana Marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other female reproductive issues. Tagetes riojana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in salads or as a garnish.
